name: darkhorse-llm-proxy
description: DarkHorse local LLM proxy service — localhost-only AI gateway

scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build

notes.no-native-modules: This package deliberately contains NO native npm modules. All storage uses VS Code SecretStorage (extension side) or flat files (proxy side). SQLite (better-sqlite3) and keytar will be added in CPI-1 once native module compilation is resolved.
notes.api-key-security: DARKHORSE_CLAUDE_API_KEY is passed via process.env at spawn time. It is NEVER written to disk, logged, or included in error messages. Upgrade to IPC key delivery in CPI-1.
cpi1-upgrades: Replace env-var API key with IPC callback to parent extension
Replace local proxy with Azure API Management / AWS API Gateway
